CustomField.description: Select this if you want to manually create fee slips. Useful when entering historical data or handling exceptions. When checked, the system will not generate slips based on the schedule details. Please Note: This checkbox cannot be edited once the Fee Schedule is created.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Select this if you want to manually create fee slips. Useful when entering historical data or handling exceptions. When checked, the system will not generate slips based on the schedule details. Please Note: This checkbox cannot be edited once the Fee Schedule is created.
CustomField.label: Manual Fee Slip Entry
